title: The Weapons Mod
description: This mod adds many a weapon, from blades of ruby and emerald to hats of rabbit. Trust me, you WILL be impressed.
body:
This mod adds the Aether, the Viper forest, and a lot more. The most powerfull item in this mod would be Judgement's Blade, which sommons a ring of lightning around the player. Another thing this mod adds is the weaponeer, you can summon them by placing an Enderite stabelizer next to a jobless villager.Ruby, Emerald, and redstone tools/armor along with enderite exist within the mod files. The transport part of this mod comes from the Mech, which makes you taller and faster. 



Feel free to post about the mod, just please link
